_note_for_player: Route 53 itself is a global service whose data plane (DNS resolution) is replicated worldwide and stayed healthy throughout the us-east-1 outage. Customer-facing hostnames (dashboard, api) resolve to ALBs in eu-west-1 and continued to work. The docs hostname resolves to a CloudFront distribution that has its origin and ACM cert in us-east-1; that path is the one that broke. Route 53 was not the cause; it just routed customers to a downstream resource that was.
